description: Expands algebraic expressions using Algebrite symbolic computation
utility: Expand products and powers: (x+1)^2 → x^2+2*x+1, (a+b)(a-b) → a^2-b^2

arguments.name: expression
arguments.description: Quoted mathematical expression to expand, may contain variables from context

alternates: expand("(x+a)^2") - uses current value of variable a
